patch:
--- a/processor.sv
+++ b/processor.sv
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@ module processor (
   multiplier_8bit mult_inst (
     .multiplicand(data_a),
-    .multiplier({{8{1'b0}}, data_b}),  // BUG: connecting 16-bit to 8-bit port
+    .multiplier(data_b),  // FIXED: connected correct 8-bit signal to 8-bit port
     .product(result)
   );
 endmodule
